mapper.select: SELECT SUM(tdv.nvmActiveEnergy) AS actual, AVG(tdv.expected_power_ac) * #{duration} FROM ${table_data_virtual} tdv WHERE tdv.time BETWEEN #{start_time} AND #{end_time}

SELECT IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(v.activePower, IFNULL(m.activePower, ivt.activePower)) / 1000), 2), 0) as activePower, (SUM(s.ac_capacity) / 1000) AS capacity, (SUM(s.dc_capacity) / 1000) AS dc_capacity FROM site s LEFT JOIN () v ON v.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN () ivt ON ivt.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN () m ON m.id_site = s.id
#{item}

SELECT s.id AS site_id, available.available_inverters, total.total_inverters, ROUND((available.available_inverters / total.total_inverters) * 100, 2) AS availability_percent, (total.total_inverters - available.available_inverters) as unavailable_inverters, AS site_name FROM site s
WHERE s.id = #{id_site}

SELECT
IFNULL(( ROUND( IFNULL(available.available_inverters, 0) / NULLIF(IFNULL(total.total_inverters, 0), 0) * 100, 2 )), 0) AS total_availability_percent, s.id
ROUND((SUM(IFNULL(available.available_inverters, 0)) OVER() / NULLIF(SUM(IFNULL(total.total_inverters, 0)) OVER(), 0)) * 100, 2) AS total_availability_percent
FROM site s
#{item}
LIMIT 1
mapper.sql:
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT d.id_site, COUNT(*) AS total_inverters FROM device d WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_device_type = 1
GROUP BY d.id_site ) AS total ON total.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT d.id_site, COUNT(*) AS available_inverters FROM device d WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_device_type = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM alert a JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error WHERE a.id_device = d.id AND a.status = 1 AND a.resolved = 0 AND a.end_date is null AND (e.id_error_level = 32 OR e.id_error_level = 33) ) GROUP BY d.id_site ) available ON available.id_site = s.id
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE hours AS ( SELECT CAST(#{start_time} AS DATETIME) AS category_time UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) FROM hours WHERE DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) <= #{end_time} ), power_data AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS category_time, AVG(tdv.nvmActivePower) AS actual, AVG(tdv.expected_power_ac) AS expected FROM ${table_data_virtual} tdv WHERE tdv.time BETWEEN #{start_time} AND #{end_time} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(h.category_time, 'UTC', #{time_zone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS category_time, COALESCE(pd.actual, 0 ) as actual_power, COALESCE(pd.expected, 0) as expect_power FROM hours h LEFT JOIN power_data pd ON pd.category_time = DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ORDER BY h.category_time;

WITH RECURSIVE hours AS ( SELECT CAST(#{start_time} AS DATETIME) AS category_time UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) FROM hours WHERE DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) <= #{end_time} ), device_data AS ( SELECT id_site, category_time, AVG(temperature) AS temperature, AVG(panelTemperature) AS panelTemperature, AVG(irradiance) AS irradiance FROM (
SELECT s.id AS id_site, DATE_FORMAT(dv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS category_time, AVG(dv.nvm_temperature) AS temperature, AVG(dv.nvm_panel_temperature) AS panelTemperature, NULL AS irradiance FROM ${item.datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE s.id = #{item.id_site} AND s.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 AND d.id = #{item.id} AND dv.time BETWEEN #{start_time} AND #{end_time} GROUP BY category_time, s.id
UNION ALL
SELECT s.id AS id_site, DATE_FORMAT(dv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS category_time, NULL AS temperature, NULL AS panelTemperature, AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) AS irradiance FROM ${item.datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE s.id = #{item.id_site} AND s.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 AND d.id = #{item.id} AND dv.time BETWEEN #{start_time} AND #{end_time} GROUP BY category_time, s.id
) x GROUP BY id_site, category_time ), expected_power_data AS ( SELECT dd.category_time, ROUND( AVG(
), 1 ) AS expected_power FROM device_data dd LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = dd.id_site GROUP BY dd.category_time )
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(h.category_time, 'UTC', #{time_zone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS category_time, COALESCE(ep.expected_power, 0) AS expected_power FROM hours h LEFT JOIN expected_power_data ep ON ep.category_time = DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ORDER BY h.category_time

WITH RECURSIVE hours AS ( SELECT
CAST(DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP()) AS DATETIME) AS category_time
CAST(DATE_SUB(DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP()), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(UTC_TIMESTAMP()) DAY) AS DATETIME) AS category_time
CAST(DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00') AS DATETIME) AS category_time
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) FROM hours WHERE DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) <=
DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
TIMESTAMP( DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP()), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(UTC_TIMESTAMP()) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '23:59:59' )
LAST_DAY(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
SELECT DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) FROM hours WHERE DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) <=
DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
TIMESTAMP( DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP()), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(UTC_TIMESTAMP()) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '23:59:59' )
LAST_DAY(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
SELECT DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM hours WHERE DATE_ADD(category_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) <=
DATE_ADD( DATE_SUB(DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP()), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(UTC_TIMESTAMP()) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY )
LAST_DAY(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
), virtual_produce_data AS ( SELECT SUM(actual) AS produce_data, category_time FROM (
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AS category_time, SUM(tdv.nvmActiveEnergy) AS actual FROM ${item.table_data_virtual} tdv WHERE
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value}), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00'), #{item.time_zone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_SUB( DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), INTERVAL WEEKDAY( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value})) DAY), #{item.time_zone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{item.time_zone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY
CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:'), LPAD(FLOOR(MINUTE(tdv.time) / 15) * 15, 2, '0'), ':00' )
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
SELECT NULL AS category_time, 0 AS actual
) s GROUP BY category_time ), produce_data AS ( SELECT SUM(actual) AS produce_data, category_time FROM (
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AS category_time, SUM(tdv.nvmActiveEnergy) AS actual FROM ${item.datatablename} tdv WHERE
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_SUB( DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), INTERVAL WEEKDAY( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value})) DAY), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY
CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:'), LPAD(FLOOR(MINUTE(tdv.time) / 15) * 15, 2, '0'), ':00' )
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
SELECT NULL AS category_time, 0 AS actual
) s GROUP BY category_time ), consume_data AS ( SELECT SUM(actual) AS consume_data, category_time FROM (
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AS category_time, SUM(tdv.nvmActiveEnergy) AS actual FROM ${item.datatablename} tdv WHERE
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_SUB( DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), INTERVAL WEEKDAY( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value})) DAY), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
tdv.time >= CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND tdv.time <= UTC_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY
CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:'), LPAD(FLOOR(MINUTE(tdv.time) / 15) * 15, 2, '0'), ':00' )
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(tdv.time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
SELECT NULL AS category_time, 0 AS actual
) s GROUP BY category_time ) SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AS category_time, (COALESCE(pd.produce_data, 0 ) + COALESCE(vpd.produce_data, 0 )) as produce_data, COALESCE(cd.consume_data, 0) as consume_data, ( (COALESCE(pd.produce_data, 0 ) + COALESCE(vpd.produce_data, 0 )) - COALESCE(cd.consume_data, 0) ) as exported_data FROM hours h LEFT JOIN produce_data pd ON pd.category_time =
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
LEFT JOIN consume_data cd ON cd.category_time =
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
LEFT JOIN virtual_produce_data vpd ON vpd.category_time =
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
DATE_FORMAT(h.category_time, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
ORDER BY h.category_time;

SELECT SUM(expected) as expected FROM (
SELECT AVG(
) * ( TIMESTAMPDIFF( SECOND,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00' )
DATE_SUB( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), INTERVAL ( WEEKDAY(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value})) + 7) DAY )
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00' )
,
CONCAT( DATE_SUB( DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL ( WEEKDAY( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value})) + 1) DAY), ' 23:59:59' )
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59' )
) / 3600) AS expected FROM ${item.datatablename} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE dv.time BETWEEN
CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' )
CONVERT_TZ( DATE_SUB( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00' ), INTERVAL ( WEEKDAY( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}) ) + 7 ) DAY ), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND CONVERT_TZ( CONCAT( DATE_SUB( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d' ), INTERVAL ( WEEKDAY( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}) ) + 1 ) DAY ), ' 23:59:59'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' )
CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND CONVERT_TZ( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59'), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' )
) t

when.foreach:
SELECT SUM(tdv.nvmActiveEnergy) AS actual, ${item.id_site} as id_site FROM ${item.table_data_virtual} tdv WHERE tdv.time BETWEEN
CONVERT_TZ( DATE_SUB(DATE(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value})), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value})) + 7 DAY), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' ) AND CONVERT_TZ( DATE_SUB(DATE(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value})), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value})) + 1 DAY), #{item.timezone_value}, 'UTC' )
CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value}), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00'), #{item.time_zone_value}, 'UTC') AND UTC_TIMESTAMP()
CONVERT_TZ(DATE(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{item.time_zone_value})), #{item.time_zone_value}, 'UTC') AND UTC_TIMESTAMP()
